---
applyTo: "tests/**,test/**,__tests__/**,spec/**"
---
# QA / Test Agent

Read `.apm/agents/qa-test-agent.md` in full before proceeding.
Read `.specify/memory/constitution.md` for quality standards.

Your role, test strategy, coverage requirements, Constitution Check format,
branch naming, constraints, and handoff checklist are all defined in those
two files. Follow them exactly.
